name: Whisper Skill
description_en: Local audio/video transcription with Whisper—no OpenAI API—plus voice dictation (push-to-talk) and burned-in MP4 subtitles. Auto-detects OS/CPU/GPU and picks the optimal backend (faster-whisper, whisper.cpp, whisperx, mlx-whisper, openvino) and model for your hardware.
description_zh: 用 Whisper 在本地转写音/视频——无需 OpenAI API——并支持语音听写(push-to-talk)与给 MP4 烧录字幕。自动识别 OS/CPU/GPU,为你的硬件挑选最优后端(faster-whisper、whisper.cpp、whisperx、mlx-whisper、openvino)与模型。
long_en: An interactive wizard installs everything in one command; supports all ~99 Whisper languages and speaker diarization, free after the initial model download.
long_zh: 交互式向导一条命令装好一切;支持 Whisper 约 99 种语言与说话人分离,首次下载模型后即免费。
sec_note_en: Runs Whisper backends locally and downloads a model (~3 GB) on first use; transcription stays on-device with no API calls. If pulling from YouTube/TikTok, respect platform Terms.
sec_note_zh: 在本地运行 Whisper 后端,首次使用会下载模型(约 3 GB);转写全程在本机、无 API 调用。若从 YouTube/TikTok 拉取,请遵守平台条款。
